step_rationale: Differential diagnostic marker; off-pathway iron metabolism/systemic.
mechanism: Serotransferrin distinguishes Type 1 MI from other troponin-elevated diseases via differential iron-handling and systemic metabolic responses independent of atherothrombotic pathophysiology.

references.title: Potential Biomarkers to Distinguish Type 1 Myocardial Infarction in Troponin-Elevated Diseases.
